attributes.action: Stop labour giving a £4Ok incentive for failed asylum seekers to leave the UK.
attributes.additional_details: This will encourage more to come. Britain's working men and women are sick tired for paying taxes for the labour government to cover bad political decisions and bad management of situations they have created.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for the same action: "Stop pilot scheme giving up to £40,000 to failed asylum seeker families" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763401
